reason: Approved design defines the subagent handoff scope, terminology, and non-goals.
Implementation must execute rollout steps in order and update status.
Requirement explains user-visible workflow capability and boundaries.
Roadmap module split and sequencing are hard constraints.
Subagent Handoff Protocol contract is a hard roadmap companion constraint.
Handoff roles consume context manifests and must not duplicate facts.
Check role must preserve implementation review and independent acceptance boundaries.
Exploration evidence identifies Trellis context/subagents and Superpowers reviewer discipline as absorption sources.
